series_metadata.series_description: Materials used in developing agency pamphlet publications, which are organized by pamphlet title. All active records identified as being needed by the Ohio Department of Medicaid (ODM) for their daily operations as of July 1, 2013, were transferred by the Ohio Department of Job and Family Services (ODJFS) to ODM. Any records that are inactive and identified as being not necessary for daily operations by ODM were retained by ODJFS

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until pamphlet is no longer created, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until pamphlet is no longer created, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
